summary: The test suite covers core functionality (manifest parsing, license checking, report rendering) and includes valuable end-to-end pipeline testing via act. However, it has significant gaps: (1) no direct unit tests for the CLI module (cli.ts), leaving flags like --fail-on, --format, and --report-file untested; (2) parser edge cases unvalidated (optional/peer dependencies declared in code but not tested, bare requirement names with 'unspecified' version not tested, non-string dependency values not tested); (3) some checker edge cases missing (empty dependency array); (4) no tests for error scenarios in CLI (missing manifest/policy/licenses files). The pipeline tests exercise the happy path well but don't validate custom flag combinations. Test organization is clean and readable, with good use of fixtures and mocks, but would miss regressions in CLI features and parser edge cases.
